hello, I'm looking for any discord server where I could be a moderator, I have a lots of experience, I've been a moderator and head of staff in the largest fortnite server that host tournaments for money,I can also help you to start your own discord server as adding bots, then doing Instagram, Tiktok and Twitter posts, the only thing I want in exchange for moderating your server is to promote my own discord server OR my socials, nothing else. DM ME IF UR INTERESTED!
social links:https://guns.lol/bubak
